summary: fix(settings): clarify passkey user-verification error copy
description:
Because:
 - The errno-233 message used "biometric" as a noun, which reads awkwardly and is harder to localize (PR #20821 review feedback).

This commit:
 - Reword the auth-error-233 FTL string and its fallback, and update the matching PagePasskeyAdd test assertion, to guide users to set up a screen lock, PIN, fingerprint, or face recognition, then try again.
